creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
You could just copy-paste the contents of your original comment to a text file and attach it to the bug using Bugzilla (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?bugid=191681&action=enter), like all other people who are kind enough to send patches to the ports tree.

It makes it much easier for other people to review, apply and commit the patches than having to do it themselves, both here and in all the other PRs you've sent (for which we're thankful).
